steps.expected: /{chain}/quote path present with from, to, amount, block, timestamp parameters and QuoteResponse schema
steps.observed: /{chain}/quote path found under .paths with all 5 parameters (from, to, amount as required; block, timestamp as optional) and response 200 referencing QuoteResponse component schema. QuoteResponse defines all required fields: from, to, amount, output_amount, block, chain, block_timestamp, route.

evidence.terminal: openapi.json paths include /quote (no chain prefix) and /{chain}/quote (with chain enum: ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, base). Parameters: from (required), to (required), amount (required), block (optional), timestamp (optional). Response schema QuoteResponse is fully defined.

assertions.title: Docker Swarm deploy works with new features

steps.action: Run docker compose config in repo root
steps.observed: Exit code 0, no errors in output. Full config rendered including all services, networks (ypricemagic-server_default), and volumes.
HTTP 200. Response: {from, to, amount: 100.0, output_amount: 0.05054827949579305, block: 24582517, chain: 'ethereum', block_timestamp: 1772608331, route: 'divide'}

evidence.terminal: docker compose config exit code 0, no errors. curl /ethereum/quote HTTP 200. No new services or ports needed — endpoint routed through existing nginx chain-path routing.

assertions.title: openapi.json schemas match actual API responses

steps.action: Compare actual /ethernet/quote response keys against openapi.json QuoteResponse schema
steps.expected: All actual response fields documented in schema, no extras, types match
steps.observed: Actual response keys: [from, to, amount, output_amount, block, chain, block_timestamp, route]. OpenAPI QuoteResponse required fields: [from, to, amount, output_amount, block, chain, block_timestamp, route]. Exact match — no extra fields, no missing fields. Types verified: from/to/chain/route are strings, amount/output_amount are numbers, block/block_timestamp are integers. route value 'divide' is in the enum ['divide', 'identity'].

evidence.terminal: curl response: {from: string, to: string, amount: 100.0 (number), output_amount: 0.050... (number), block: 24582517 (integer), chain: 'ethereum' (string), block_timestamp: 1772608331 (integer), route: 'divide' (string enum)}. openapi.json QuoteResponse schema specifies same 8 fields all required. 100% match.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-DOCS-009: /{chain}/quote path is present in openapi.json with all required parameters and QuoteResponse schema. VAL-DOCS-014: docker compose config renders cleanly and /ethereum/quote returns HTTP 200 through nginx routing. VAL-DOCS-016: Actual API response fields exactly match openapi.json QuoteResponse schema (8 fields, correct types, route enum value valid).
